health_conditions: moderate hair shedding due to TRT

benefits.description: Using cosmetic peptides to address hair shedding from TRT; peptides cited to increase hair growth, enhance adhesion molecules, stimulate hair strengthening genes, increase anagen hair proportion, and slow DHT production
Using cosmetic peptides for youth enhancement and anti-aging maintenance

protocol_notes: Plans to use GHK-Cu, AHK-Cu, and Biotinoyl via injection, topical (with microdermabrasion needles on scalp and face), and oral (enteric encapsulation hack for GHK-Cu). Currently on TRT. Finasteride not an option. Protocol described as planned/upcoming rather than completed.
